title: Zehneria scaberrima
intro: Zehneria scaberrima, commonly known as the Indian cucumber or snake gourd, is a type of vining plant belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Zehneria scaberrima include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In Ayurvedic medicine, Zehneria scaberrima is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are said to have therapeutic effects on the body.
